audit_summary.summary_text: The playground skill is a well-documented, legitimate skill for creating interactive HTML playgrounds. It provides templates for various use cases (design, data exploration, concept mapping, document critique, diff review, code mapping). The skill focuses on generating self-contained HTML files with inline CSS/JS, live previews, and prompt output. No malicious patterns, hidden instructions, exfiltration commands, or credential harvesting were detected. The code patterns shown are standard front-end development practices for interactive tools.

vulnerabilities.title: Unpinned Dependencies (Low Severity - No External Dependencies)
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: The skill explicitly states 'No external dependencies' and 'Single HTML file. Inline all CSS and JS.' This is a security best practice, not a vulnerability. The skill correctly avoids unpinned dependencies by design.
vulnerabilities.code_evidence: Core requirements: 'Single HTML file. Inline all CSS and JS. No external dependencies.'
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: No impact. The skill intentionally avoids external dependencies, eliminating supply chain risks.
vulnerabilities.remediation: No action needed. Continue to enforce no external dependencies in generated playgrounds.
